channel.title: Threat-Analysis on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Threat-Analysis on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: GigaWiper: Anatomy of a destructive backdoor assembled from multiple malware
item.description:
Microsoft describes GigaWiper as a destructive backdoor that merges wiping and ransomware-like capabilities into one platform. The analysis focuses on how it reuses code from multiple malware families and offers guidance for detection and defense.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
